title: Service delivery - Canada.ca
content:
- Special processing measures for foreign nationals in Canada affected by domestic natural disasters
- Special processing measures: Persons directly affected by the 2025 wildfires throughout Canada
- Guidance for special measures to support Hong Kong residents to come to Canada
- Afghanistan special measures
- Ukraine special measures
- Measures to support Ukrainians and their family members – post Canada-Ukraine Authorization for Emergency Travel
- Facilitated access to renewals of open work permits for Ukrainians and their family members in Canada who were facilitated under previous public policies
- Pathway to permanent residence: Family reunification for Ukrainian nationals
- Pathway to permanent residence: Foreign nationals who were in state care
- Temporary special measures to support Iranian nationals for applications received on or before February 28, 2025
- Temporary special measures to support Iranian nationals for applications received on or after March 1, 2025
- Temporary public policy to support Iranian nationals for applications received on or after March 1, 2026
- Temporary measures to support family members of Canadian citizens and permanent residents who have departed Sudan
- Temporary measures for overseas clients affected by the crisis in Sudan
- Temporary measures to support nationals of Sudan in Canada
- In-Canada temporary measures to support foreign nationals in response to the crisis in Israel and Palestinian Territories
- Temporary resident visas for certain extended family affected by the crisis in Gaza
- Temporary public policy to facilitate issuance of permanent resident visas to certain Colombian, Haitian, and Venezuelan nationals with family in Canada
- Temporary special measures in response to the crisis in Haiti
- Temporary public policy to facilitate permanent residence to certain foreign nationals affected by the conflict in Sudan with family in Canada
- Temporary public policy to reunite privately-sponsored Yazidis and those resettled under the temporary public policy for the resettlement (2017) or family reunification of survivors of Daesh (2019) with their family members and extended family members
- In-Canada temporary measures to support foreign nationals in response to the crisis in Lebanon
- In-Canada temporary measures to support foreign nationals in response to the crisis in the state of Palestine
- Temporary public policy to further facilitate permanent residence to certain foreign nationals affected by the conflict in Sudan with family in Canada – Post February 25, 2025
- Appeals ( PDF , 146.42 KB )
- Judicial Review ( PDF , 185.6 KB )
- Interviews and interpreters
- Addressing cases where a person has experienced abuse
- Decision making: Standard of review and process for making a reasonable decision
- Extending the validity of visas
- Reconsideration after refusal

## Managing information
- Responding to requests for information under the Access to Information Act and Privacy Act
- Document retention/digitization and disposition
- Itinerant services in Canada: Immigration and Citizenship
- Response to inquiries (migration offices): Clients and representatives
- Emailing clients who have paper-based applications
- Use of Government of Canada symbols

## Working with third parties
- Interviews and interpreters
- Use of representatives
- Immigration Loans Program (ILP)
- Resettlement Assistance Program (RAP)
- Standard requirements for applicants
